feed.title: bbcnews TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

entry.title: Kirsten Dunst said she ‘didn’t even think to ask’ to be paid in line with the male actor. #KirstenDunst #BringItOn #Spiderman #SpidermanMovie #Actor #Movies #Hollywood #Film #Cinema #FilmTok #00sFilm #BBCNews

entry.title: He was convicted of taking images of a total of 15 women from social media and uploading to porn websites. #DeepFakes #Cambridge #AI #BBCNews

entry.title: "I've been offered tons of trans roles, and I just don't want to do it.” #HunterSchafer #Euphoria #Transgender #Trans #FilmTok #HBO #GQ #Jules #MovieTok #TV #TVTok #News #BBCNews

entry.title: The Teaching Regulation Agency's panel found that "there is a real risk of Ms Morris repeating her offending behaviour" and noted she was "deliberate and sustained". #DeputyHead#Teacher#Teaching#Safeguard#Wigan#BBCNews
entry.content: The Teaching Regulation Agency's panel found that "there is a real risk of Ms Morris repeating her offending behaviour" and noted she was "deliberate and sustained". #DeputyHead#Teacher#Teaching#Safeguard#Wigan#BBCNews
